description: Style Note You'll catch every passing eye with this beautiful bracelet from pitaraa. The subtle design in white metal adds a sophisticated touch, while the silver colour provides an exquisite sheen. Wear it for that special day and get the mood just right with this piece! Product Details Fifteen strands of silver colour beads curved to form a bracelet and an opening that can be stretched to slide the hand through Material and Care White metal Polish with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirt Size Diameter of bracelet: 6 cm
